stemHtml: Above 3050 m (10 000 ft) AMSL, the VMC minima for flights under VFR in all Classes of airspace are…

options.a: visibility of 8 km and distance from clouds 1500 m horizontal and 1000 ft vertical.
options.b: not defined because VFR flights above 3050 m / 10 000 ft are not permitted.
options.c: visibility of 5 km and distance from clouds 1500 m horizontal and 1000 ft vertical.
options.d: visibility of 8 km and clear of clouds.
